item.description:
✅ 复制成功

@article{meng2019fully, title={Fully dense multiscale fusion network for hyperspectral image classification}, author={Meng, Zhe and Li, Lingling and Jiao, Licheng and Feng, Zhixi and Tang, Xu and Liang, Miaomiao}, journal={Remote Sensing}, volume={11}, number={22}, pages={2718}, year={2019}, publisher={MDPI} }
Meng Z, Li L, Jiao L, et al. Fully dense multiscale fusion network for hyperspectral image classification[J]. Remote Sensing, 2019, 11(22): 2718.
⬇ 下载标准 .bib 文件

✅ 复制成功

@article{meng2019multipath, title={Multipath residual network for spectral-spatial hyperspectral image classification}, author={Meng, Zhe and Li, Lingling and Tang, Xu and Feng, Zhixi and Jiao, Licheng and Liang, Miaomiao}, journal={Remote Sensing}, volume={11}, number={16}, pages={1896}, year={2019}, publisher={MDPI} }

✅ 复制成功

✅ 复制成功
